name: Corporate Events
headline: Team Events That Actually Deliver
description: Company happy hours, team outings, client entertaining, and corporate buyouts. Full AV capability, flexible spaces, and catering that impresses.
metaDescription: Company happy hours, team outings, client entertaining, and corporate buyouts — full AV and catering that impresses.

faqs.q: Does Park 101 have AV for presentations?
faqs.a: Yes — full AV capability is available for presentations, client entertaining, and team events.

faqs.q: Can we book a full corporate buyout?
faqs.a: Yes. Corporate events can scale up to a full private buyout for up to 200 guests.
Catering packages are built around your event as part of the corporate events program.

imageAlt: Corporate Events venue space at Park 101 Carlsbad
